title: centaurea ovina
intro: Centaurea ovina, also known as red bartsia or goat's beard, is a flowering plant in the bartsia family native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. Centaurea ovina has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
